When you pick the Stormcast Eternals faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Draconith Skywing Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Stormcast Eternals faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: Draconith Skywing. All units in your army gain the Draconith Skywing keyword.

rules.name: Thunderous Roar
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING MONSTER** that has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with it to be the targets.
rules.effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, subtract 5 from that target’s control score for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Aetheric Cyclone
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING MONSTER** that has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, subtract 1 from wound rolls for the target’s attacks for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Shields of the Warden
rules.effect:
While any friendly **Stormdrake Guard** units are within a friendly **Ionus Cryptborn**’s combat range:

• That friendly **Ionus Cryptborn** has **WARD (4+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for that friendly **Ionus Cryptborn**, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly **Stormdrake Guard** unit within its combat range after the damage sequence for that friendly **Ionus Cryptborn** has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

rules.name: Exemplars of Fury
rules.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of **Companion** weapons used by friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING HEROES** while they are within 6" of 2 or more friendly **Stormdrake Guard** units.

artefacts.name: Celestium Ensign
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), End of Any Turn
artefacts.effect: **Heal (3)** each friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING** unit wholly within 12" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Fearless Fliers
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit is not in combat, it can immediately make a D6" move and can end that move in combat.

spells.name: Regal Authority
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 5 to the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: Sigmar's Grace
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: **Heal (D3)** the target. If the chanting roll was 8+, **Heal (2D3)** the target instead.

spells.name: Sanctification
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING PRIEST** to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from casting rolls for enemy **WIZARDS** while they are within 30" of the chanter. If the chanting roll was 12+, subtract 1 from casting rolls for enemy **WIZARDS** for the rest of the battle and friendly **PRIESTS** cannot use this ability again for the rest of the battle.

spells.name: Summon Everblaze Comet
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Everblaze Comet** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DRACONITH SKYWING WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up an **Everblaze Comet** wholly within 18" of the caster.

unitPool: Ionus Cryptborn, Warden of Lost Souls

armiesOfRenown.name: Droggz's Gitmob
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The Snarlfang-riding grots of the Gitmobs do not fear the light of day. Rather, they covet the power that so obviously rivals the Bad Moon’s own. Upon defeating their enemies, they scavenge the equipment of the fallen, accruing metal that they can use to rob Hysh of its power. From their mountain dens, they ride each day, chasing the light and capturing it in scrap blessed by their shamans for this purpose.

When you pick the Gloomspite Gitz faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Droggz’s Gitmob Army of Renown. If you do so, use those faction rules instead of the Gloomspite Gitz faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: Droggz's Gitmob. All units in your army gain the Droggz’s Gitmob keyword.

rules.name: Dis Fight's Not Fer Me
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Enemy Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DROGGZ'S GITMOB** unit that is in combat with any enemy units that charged this turn and is not in combat with any enemy units that did not charge this turn to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, the target can immediately use the 'Retreat' ability as if it were your movement phase.

rules.name: Surprise, Ya Gitz!
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DROGGZ’S GITMOB** unit that is **outflanking the enemy**.
rules.effect: Set up that unit on the battlefield wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

rules.name: Glowering Light
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with a friendly **DROGGZ’S GITMOB** unit that has charged this turn to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, the target cannot make a pile-in move when it is picked to use a **FIGHT** ability.

rules.name: Get Around 'Em
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DROGGZ’S GITMOB** unit that has not been deployed.
rules.effect: Set up that unit in reserve **outflanking the enemy**. It has now been deployed.

artefacts.name: Glareface's Grin
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Shooting Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick a point on the battlefield within 9" of this unit. Each visible enemy unit within 3" of that point is a target.
artefacts.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

heroicTraits.name: Plucky Git
heroicTraits.effect: While this unit has no damage points, friendly **DROGGZ'S** **GITMOB** units have **WARD (6+)** while they are wholly within 9" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Stick 'Em and Run
heroicTraits.effect: Each time this unit uses a **RETREAT** ability or the ‘Frazzlegit’s Flame Stream’ ability, before moving this unit, pick an enemy unit in combat with it and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

spells.name: Frazzleblast
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **DROGGZ'S GITMOB** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target's melee weapons have **Crit (2 Hits)**.

spells.name: Summon Mork's Mighty Mushroom
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Mork's Mighty Mushroom** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **GLOOMSPITE GITZ WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Mork's Mighty Mushroom** wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: Gorechosen Champions
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Each warhorde is led by a lord who is not only a veteran killer but also able to direct the violence of their followers to serve their ambitions. Beneath them is their Gorechosen: a coterie of eight war-blessed lieutenants marked by the daemonic boons they have received for pleasing acts of carnage. A Gorechosen can be a truly eclectic mix of killers, each leading forces carved in their image. Rabid battle-priests, hulking smiths, fanatical head-hunters and former paladins consumed by bloodlust - all and more may serve a Lord of Khorne. When the Gorechosen march alongside their warlord, febrile energy fills the air, for their god's gaze follows them, and all know that they fight to determine who amongst them is worthiest to rule...

When you pick the Blades of Khorne faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Gorechosen Champions Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Blades of Khorne faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: Gorechosen Champions. All units in your army gain the **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS** keyword.

rules.name: Murder-won Trophies
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS HERO** to be the target.
rules.effect:
Give the target 1 artefact of power from the 'Gorechosen Champions' Army of Renown rules.

**Designer's Note:** *This artefact of power is given to the **HERO** during the deployment phase, not during army composition.*

rules.name: Brutal Lashmaster
rules.effect: Each time a friendly **Bloodstoker** uses the 'Whipped to Fury' ability, another friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS HERO** within its combat range can be picked to be the target of that ability instead of a non-**HERO BLOODBOUND** unit.

rules.name: Legendary Slayers
rules.effect: **Blood-hungry** weapons used by friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS** units have **Crit (Mortal)**.

rules.name: The Red God's Eye
rules.effect: Friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS** units have **WARD (6+)**.

rules.name: Hate-fuelled Killers
rules.effect: The first time each friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS** unit would be destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 5+, that unit is not destroyed and any remaining damage points inflicted on it have no effect. Then, **Heal (1)** that unit.

artefacts.name: Warmonger's Icon
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick this unit and up to D3 friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS** units within this unit's combat range to be the targets.
artefacts.effect: The targets have **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: The Scarring Blade
artefacts.effect:
Allocate D3 damage points to this unit (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). For the rest of the turn, add **X** to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS** units for the rest of the turn, where **X** is equal to the number of damage points allocated to this unit this turn by this ability.

For the rest of the battle, this unit cannot use the ‘Hate-fuelled Killers’ ability and cannot be healed.

artefacts.name: Bloodmist Skull
artefacts.effect: This unit has **WARD (3+)** against damage inflicted by shooting attacks.

heroicTraits.name: Crowned in Butchery
heroicTraits.effect: Add 20 to this unit's control score while it is in combat.

spells.name: Skin of Brass
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target that friendly unit. If the chanting roll was 8+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.

spells.name: Eruption of Apoplexy
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them that is in combat with a friendly unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Inflict D6 mortal damage on the target. If the target is destroyed, before removing the last model in that unit from play, inflict D3 mortal damage on every unit (friendly and enemy) within 6" of that model, or D6 mortal damage instead if the chanting roll was 8+.

spells.name: Cowed and Broken
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GORECHOSEN CHAMPIONS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them that is in combat with a friendly unit to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Roll 8 dice. If the chanting roll was 8+, add 1 to each roll. For each 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

spells.name: Summon Wrath-Axe
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Wrath-axe** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **BLADES OF KHORNE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Wrath-axe** wholly within 12" of the chanter, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

unitPool: Scourge of Ghyran Mighty Lord of Khorne
requiredGeneralWarscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Mighty Lord of Khorne

warscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Mighty Lord of Khorne

armiesOfRenown.name: Grundstok Expeditionary Force
armiesOfRenown.lore:
There is no more august body of the Kharadron military than the Grundcorps. These hardened mercenaries are contracted to the sky-fleets for missions of vital importance, and are often organised into Expeditionary Forces – vanguard companies designed to move swiftly and unleash devastating salvoes. Typically led by an Admiral, these potent formations focus the Grundcorps’ superior firepower on a specific target, utilising swift Gunhaulers to keep one step ahead.

When you pick the Kharadron Overlords faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Grundstok Expeditionary Force Army of Renown. If you do so, use these faction rules instead of the Kharadron Overlords faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: Grundstok Expeditionary Force. All units in your army gain the Expeditionary Force keyword.

rules.name: No Safe Haven
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.
rules.effect: Subtract 1 from the control score of that unit for each damage point allocated to it this turn by a shooting attack made by a friendly **EXPEDITIONARY FORCE** unit, to a maximum of 10 damage points.

rules.name: Transport Skyfarers
rules.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a non-CHARGE MOVE ability for a friendly SKYVESSEL
rules.effect:
Pick a number of units up to that **SKYVESSEL**’s Transport Capacity (see its warscroll) that are wholly within 6" of it to be the targets. Units that have been transported this turn cannot be targets.

Remove the targets from the battlefield. After the **SKYVESSEL** ends its move, you must set up each target unit on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of that **SKYVESSEL** and not in combat. Those units have been transported. A unit cannot use **CHARGE** abilities if it was transported in the same turn.

rules.name: Gun Butt Low Blow
rules.effect: While a friendly **EXPEDITIONARY FORCE INFANTRY** unit is contesting an objective that you control, its melee weapons have **Crit (Mortal)**.

rules.name: Grudgefire Rounds
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **EXPEDITIONARY FORCE INFANTRY** unit to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, pick 1 of the target’s ranged weapons. Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that weapon for the rest of the phase.

artefacts.name: Aetheric Nullifier
artefacts.phaseDetails: Reaction: Opponent declared a SHOOT or FIGHT ability for a MANIFESTATION within 9" of the bearer
artefacts.effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll equals or exceeds the banishment value listed on the **MANIFESTATION**’s warscroll, it is banished and removed from play. You cannot pick the same **MANIFESTATION** to be the target of this ability more than once per phase.

heroicTraits.name: Entrenchment Expert
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared the ‘All-out Defence’ command for a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this HERO
heroicTraits.effect: That friendly unit has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

armiesOfRenown.name: Heroes of the First-Forged
armiesOfRenown.lore:
To wear the gold of the Hammers of Sigmar is to embody hope itself. Clad in the mantle of exceptionalism, they strive to be the greatest of the God-King's champions. It is not an easy thing to walk such a path. Those of the First-Forged Host cannot fail, cannot ever show a moment's hesitation or indecisiveness. To do so would be to shatter the faith of so many fervent souls who venerate them as the incarnations of the heavens' might. It would be to dishonour a legacy that was crafted in the very first engagements of Sigmar' s reignited war, when they defeated the bloodthirsty marauders of the Goretide on the ash-plains of the Brimstone Peninsula. They seized the Gates of Azyr in the aftermath of that brutal battle, enabling Sigmar's Tempest to break across the realms. Ever since, their legend has grown over many years of hard-fought victories.

When you pick the Stormcast Eternals faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Heroes of the First-Forged Army of Renown. If you do so, use those faction rules instead of the Stormcast Eternals faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: Heroes of the First-Forged. All units in your army gain the First-Forged keyword.

rules.name: Summon the Storm
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: If a friendly **Bastian Carthalos** is on the battlefield and was not set up this turn, you can pick a friendly **STORMCAST ETERNALS** unit that is **in the Celestial Realm**.
rules.effect: Set up that unit wholly within 6" of a friendly **Bastian** **Carthalos** and more than 3" from all enemy units. If the target is a unit of **Annihilators** or **Annihilators with Meteoric** **Grandhammers**, for the rest of the turn, the target counts as having used the 'Scions of the Storm' ability for the purposes of the 'Blazing Impact' ability.

rules.name: Punch Through
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Charge Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **INFANTRY** unit in combat that has not charged this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect: That unit can immediately use the 'Charge' ability and can move through enemy models when it does so.

rules.name: Scions of the Storm
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **STORMCAST ETERNALS** unit that is **in the** **Celestial Realm**.
rules.effect: Set up that unit anywhere on the battlefield more than 9" from all enemy units.

rules.name: The Celestial Realm
rules.declare: If there are more friendly **STORMCAST ETERNALS** units on the battlefield than there are set up in reserve, pick a friendly **STORMCAST ETERNALS** unit that has not been deployed.
rules.effect: Set up that unit in reserve **in the Celestial Realm**. It has now been deployed.

artefacts.name: Shield of Skjordamar
artefacts.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the battle.

heroicTraits.name: Thegn of Bellicos
heroicTraits.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit's melee weapons while it is wholly within 6" of a friendly **Bastian** **Carthalos**.

lores.name: Heroes of the First-Forged Spell Lore

spells.name: Storm's Wrath
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **FIRST-FORGED WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 9" of them to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

spells.name: Wreathed in the Storm
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **FIRST-FORGED WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **STORMCAST ETERNALS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: For the rest of the turn, each time you make an unmodified save roll of 6 for a combat attack that targets the target unit, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

lores.name: Heroes of the First-Forged Prayer Lore

spells.name: Speed of the Righteous
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **FIRST-FORGED PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **STORMCAST ETERNALS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be a target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of the target for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 6+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target.

manifestationLores.name: Heroes of the First-Forged Manifestation Lore

spells.name: Summon Everblaze Comet
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Everblaze Comet** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **FIRST-FORGED WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up an **Everblaze Comet** wholly within 18" of the caster.

armiesOfRenown.name: King Brodd's Stomp
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Most famed and feared of all Mega-Gargants is the mighty King Brodd, priest of Behemat and scourge of the small folk. Fuelled by hatred of those who slew his forefather and desperate for revenge, Brodd gathers to his side gargants from across the Mortal Realms, uniting them in a stomp of epic proportions.

When you pick the Sons of Behemat faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a King Brodd’s Stomp Army of Renown. If you do so, use these faction rules instead of the Sons of Behemat faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: King Brodd's Stomp. All units in your army gain the Brodd’s Stomp keyword.

rules.name: The World Titan's Prophet
rules.effect:
While any other friendly **BRODD’S STOMP** units are within a friendly **King Brodd**’s combat range:

• That friendly **King Brodd** has **WARD (5+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for that friendly **King Brodd**, allocate 1 damage point to another friendly **BRODD’S STOMP** unit within its combat range after the damage sequence for that friendly **King Brodd** has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

rules.name: Wrath of Brodd
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Charge Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MEGA‑GARGANT** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect: If the unit using this ability charged this turn, roll a dice. On a 3+, that unit can move 3D6" but must end that move in combat.

rules.name: Watch This!
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MEGA‑GARGANT** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect:
If the target is a **HERO**, **BEAST**, **MONSTER** or **WAR MACHINE**, roll 6 dice. Otherwise, roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each roll that is equal to or greater than the target’s Save characteristic, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

The **MEGA‑GARGANT** using this **RAMPAGE** has **STRIKE‑LAST** for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Double Stomp
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MEGA‑GARGANT** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect: Roll a D6. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add the result to the Attacks characteristic of the **Almighty Stomp** or **Almightier Stomp** of the unit using this ability.

rules.name: Timberrrrr!
rules.effect: Each time a friendly **MEGA‐GARGANT** or **GARGANT** model is slain, before removing it from play, the players must roll off. The winner picks a point on the battlefield within 3" of that model. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point that has a lower Health characteristic than that model.

rules.name: Smash It All To Bits
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MEGA-GARGANT** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick a terrain feature within its combat range. Then, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of that **MEGA-GARGANT** to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a D3 for each friendly and enemy unit on the terrain feature that was picked. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll. After rolling for all those units, roll a dice. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

rules.name: Crafty Creepers
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MEGA‑GARGANT** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy **HERO** that has an artefact of power and is in combat with that **MEGA‑GARGANT** to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target no longer has that artefact of power.

artefacts.name: Lucky Shiny Hat
artefacts.effect: This unit has **WARD (4+)** against damage points inflicted by **SPELL** and **PRAYER** abilities and by abilities used by **MANIFESTATIONS**.

heroicTraits.name: I Can Do That Better
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Reaction: You declared the ‘Wrath of Brodd’ ability for a friendly unit
heroicTraits.effect: This unit can use the ‘Wrath of Brodd’ ability immediately after the ‘Wrath of Brodd’ ability used by the other friendly unit has been resolved. This unit can do so even if it has used another **RAMPAGE** ability this turn.

spells.name: High Expectations
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **BRODD’S STOMP PRIEST** to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **BRODD’S STOMP** units while they are wholly within 12" of the chanter. If the chanting roll was 9+, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic instead.

armiesOfRenown.name: Knights of the Crimson Keep
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Grim and blood-drenched are the tales of the Crimson Keep, the cursed fortress of Prince Vhordrai and his Kastelai knights. It has existed since before Vhordrai even came to prominence, a potent symbol of vampiric military dominance that has been turned by Nagash into a gaol and a realm-shifting weapon. Legend has it that it was forged by the Blood Emperor during the Age of Myth and once stood at the centre of an entire Soulblight civilisation.

That empire, and with it the Crimson Keep, would be brought to heel by the Undying King. Nagash’s sorcery dragged the entire structure out of synchronisation with reality, transforming its stones into spectral matter and allowing the Keep to manifest out of the ruins of shattered castles across the Mortal Realms. From this lair, Prince Vhordrai launches murderous crusades against the living whilst also seeking the means to free himself from the curse that binds him to the macabre fortress.

When you pick the Soulblight Gravelords faction for your army, you can choose it to be a Knights of the Crimson Keep Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules as described in Army of Renown: Knights of the Crimson Keep instead of the Soulblight Gravelords faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed as described in Army of Renown: Knights of the Crimson Keep. All units in your army gain the Crimson Keep keyword.

rules.name: Carve A Bloody Path
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **Blood Knights** unit that is in combat to use this ability.
rules.effect: That unit can use a **CHARGE** ability even though it is in combat and even if it has already used a **CHARGE** ability this turn.

rules.name: From A Quarter Unseen
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Movement Phase
rules.declare: You cannot use this ability in the first battle round. Pick each friendly unit that is **in the Crimson Keep** to be the targets.
rules.effect: Set up each target wholly within 9" of the battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you set up any units using this ability in the third or a subsequent battle round, do not spend any command points when using the ‘Carve a Bloody Path’ command this turn.

rules.name: Blood Rampage
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CRIMSON KEEP MONSTER** that is in combat and has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect:
This unit can make a move of 2D6". It must end that move in combat with the target unit. Then, roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target unit’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use **RAMPAGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: The Crimson Keep
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CRIMSON KEEP** unit that has not been deployed.
rules.effect: Set up that unit in reserve **in the Crimson Keep**. It has now been deployed. You cannot set up more friendly units **in the Crimson Keep** than there are on the battlefield.

artefacts.name: Chalice of the Blood Dragon
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, End of Any Turn
artefacts.effect: **Heal (3D3)** this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Immortal Dedication
heroicTraits.effect:
This unit receives D3 **martial prowess tokens**. Each **martial prowess token** can be spent to do 1 of the following:

• Re-roll a hit roll for this unit.
• Re-roll a wound roll for this unit.
• Re-roll a save roll for this unit.

At the start of the next turn, remove all this unit’s **martial prowess tokens**.

lores.name: Knights of the Crimson Keep Spell Lore

spells.name: Deathly Gale
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **CRIMSON KEEP** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for the target, to a maximum of 3.

spells.name: Siphon Strength
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for attacks made by the caster.

spells.name: Awakened Fury
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly Crimson Keep unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the target’s **Companion** melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

manifestationLores.name: Knights of the Crimson Keep Manifestation Lore

spells.name: Summon Unholy Reliquary
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Unholy Reliquary** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **CRIMSON KEEP WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up an **Unholy Reliquary** wholly within 18" of the caster.

armiesOfRenown.name: Krazogg’s Grunta Stampede
armiesOfRenown.lore:
When a Tuskboss goes on the rampage, it is only a matter of time before he is joined by other hogs of war, drawn to the beating of hooves upon the earth. These brutes move at high speed between the biggest and bestest fights – and once they start charging, it is very hard to slow down.

When you pick the Ironjawz faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Krazogg’s Grunta Stampede Army of Renown. If you do so, use these faction rules instead of the Ironjawz faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: Krazogg's Grunta Stampede. All units in your army gain the Grunta Stampede keyword.

rules.name: Wall of Hogflesh
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **GRUNTA STAMPEDE HERO** to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target that **HERO** while it is wholly within 6" of a friendly non-**HERO GRUNTA STAMPEDE** unit.

rules.name: Fast and Furious
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO GRUNTA STAMPEDE** unit to be the target.
rules.effect: The target can immediately use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

rules.name: Monstrous Momentum
rules.effect: Add the current battle round number to the Move characteristic of friendly **GRUNTA STAMPEDE** units.

rules.name: Eatin' On Da Hoof
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **GRUNTA STAMPEDE MONSTER** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice and add the momentum score of the unit using this ability to the roll. If the result exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.

rules.name: Grunta Waaagh!
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Charge Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **GRUNTA STAMPEDE HERO** to be the target.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn, the following effects apply to friendly **GRUNTA STAMPEDE** units while they are wholly within 18" of the target:

• You can re-roll charge rolls for those units.
• Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those units’ **Maw-grunta’s Trotters**.
• Roll a D6 instead of a D3 when determining the amount of mortal damage inflicted by the ‘Goregrunta Charge’ ability of those units.

rules.name: Incessant Drive
rules.phaseDetails: End of the First Battle Round
rules.effect: Add 1 to the momentum scores of friendly **MAW-GRUNTA** units.

artefacts.name: Da Boom Skull
artefacts.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a command for a friendly GRUNTA STAMPEDE unit wholly within 18" of this unit
artefacts.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with that friendly unit to be the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

heroicTraits.name: Trophy Hunta
heroicTraits.effect: This unit’s **Pig-hakka** has **Anti-MONSTER (+1 Rend)** and **Anti-WAR MACHINE (+1 Rend)**.

armiesOfRenown.name: Legion of the First Prince
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Be’lakor, first of the Daemon Princes, is a being of boundless darkness. His titanic form was wrought aeons ago by all four of the Brothers in Darkness, each pouring a portion of their might into him. For centuries, he was their perfect instrument of destruction and harbinger
of corruption, beckoning countless supplicants into the shadows of Chaos worship and bringing about the ruin of innumerable empires.

Then came the Everchosen, and Be’lakor was cast aside.

When you pick the Slaves to Darkness faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Legion of the First Prince Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Slaves to Darkness faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box opposite. All units in your army gain the Legion of the First Prince keyword except for those in a Regiment of Renown.

rules.name: First-Damned Prince
rules.effect:
While a friendly **Be’lakor** is within the combat range of any friendly non-**HERO LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE DAEMON** units:

• That friendly **Be’lakor** has **WARD (4+)**.

• In addition, each time you make a successful ward roll for that friendly **Be’lakor**, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly non-**HERO LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE DAEMON** unit within **Be’lakor**’s combat range after the damage sequence for **Be’lakor** has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

rules.name: Storm of Blackened Blades
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **Eternus** that is in combat and up to 2 friendly non-**HERO** non-**DAEMON LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE** units wholly within 12" of that **Eternus** to be the targets.
rules.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets’ melee weapons for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Daemonic Reinforcements
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE DAEMON INFANTRY** or **CAVALRY** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
rules.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of a friendly **Be’lakor** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

rules.name: Bestow Favour
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: If a friendly **Be’lakor** is on the battlefield, pick a non-**HERO LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE** unit to be the target.
rules.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:
• Add 5 to the target’s control score.
• If the target is a **DAEMON** unit, add 1 to save rolls for the target.
• If the target is a non-**DAEMON** unit, it has **WARD (6+)**.

artefacts.name: Black Ritual Dagger
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Reaction: You declared a SPELL ability for a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit
artefacts.effect: Allocate 1 damage point to this unit. Then, you can re-roll the casting roll.

heroicTraits.name: Dread Marshal
heroicTraits.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly units wholly within 12" of this unit to be targets.
heroicTraits.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for the targets for the rest of the turn.

lores.name: Legion of the First Prince Spell Lore

spells.name: Dark Cantrip
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick up to 3 visible enemy units within 18" of them to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Inflict 1 mortal damage on each target.

spells.name: Shroud in Darkness
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE** unit that is not in combat and is wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: The target can move D6". It cannot end that move in combat. In addition, until the start of your next turn, the target is not visible to enemy units while they are more than 12" away.

manifestationLores.name: Legion of the First Prince Manifestation Lore

spells.name: Summon Eightfold Doom-Sigil
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Eightfold Doom-Sigil** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **LEGION OF THE FIRST PRINCE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up an **Eightfold Doom-Sigil** wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: Lofnir Drothkeepers
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The Lofnir lodge is said to be the most dedicated to Vulcatrix, the Ur-Salamander. Their fanaticism runs so deeply that even other Fyreslayers treat them warily. Masters of the art of beast-taming, Lofnir Drothkeepers search the length and breadth of the realms for the eggs of Magmadroths, said to be Vulcatrix’s spawn.

When you pick the Fyreslayers faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Lofnir Drothkeepers Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Fyreslayers faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: Lofnir Drothkeepers. All units in your army gain the Drothkeepers keyword.

rules.name: Daring Tamers
rules.effect: Enemy **MONSTERS** have **STRIKE-LAST** while they are in combat with 2 or more friendly **DROTHKEEPERS Vulkyn Flameseekers** units.

rules.name: Skilled Drothwranglers
rules.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a non-CHARGE MOVE ability for a friendly MAGMADROTH
rules.effect:
Pick a friendly **Vulkyn Flameseekers** unit and/or a friendly **DROTHKEEPERS INFANTRY HERO** that are not in combat and are wholly within 6" of the **MAGMADROTH** to be the targets. Units that have **hitched a lift** this turn (see below) cannot be targets.

Remove the targets from the battlefield. After the **MAGMADROTH** ends its move, you must set up each target on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of the **MAGMADROTH** and not in combat. The targets have **hitched a lift**. Units that **hitched a lift** cannot use **CHARGE** abilities in the same turn.

rules.name: Rearing Strike
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DROTHKEEPERS MONSTER** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll 2 dice. Add 2 to each roll if the target is a **MONSTER**. For each 5+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

rules.name: Searing Claws
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DROTHKEEPERS MONSTER** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, for the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of melee weapons used for attacks that target that enemy unit.

rules.name: Ferocious Heat
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **DROTHKEEPERS MONSTER** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, ward rolls cannot be made for the target for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Mastery Over Monsters
artefacts.effect: While this unit is contesting an objective, enemy **MONSTERS** contesting that objective each have a maximum control score of 2.

heroicTraits.name: Raised Around Beasts
heroicTraits.effect: The melee weapons of friendly non-**MONSTER** units have **Anti-MONSTER (+1 Rend)** while they are wholly within 9" of this unit.

spells.name: Breath of Vulcatrix
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **DROTHKEEPERS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **DROTHKEEPERS MAGMADROTH** wholly within 12" of them to be a target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the Damage characteristic of the target’s **Roaring Fyrestream** is 3 instead of D3.

spells.name: Summon Molten Infernoth
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Molten Infernoth** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **DROTHKEEPERS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Molten Infernoth** wholly within 12" of the chanter, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

warscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Auric Runeson on Magmadroth

armiesOfRenown.name: Lords of the Clan
armiesOfRenown.lore:
When the hour is dire, the leaders and elite of a Sylvaneth clan will suspend their duties of governance and guardianship to join their kin in battle, bringing their ancient wisdom and awesome strength to bear against the glade’s foes. Often towering over their followers, they are walking symbols of the forest’s soaring might.

When you pick the Sylvaneth faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Lords of the Clan Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Sylvaneth faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed as described in Army of Renown: Lords of the Clan. All units in your army gain the **LORDS OF THE CLAN** keyword.

rules.name: Dormant Heroes
rules.declare: If there are more friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN** units on the battlefield than there are in reserve, pick a friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN MONSTER** unit that has not been deployed.
rules.effect: Set up that unit in reserve as a **dormant forest spirit**. It has now been deployed.

rules.name: Our Reach is Long
rules.effect:
The **creeping overgrowth** (referenced by other abilities) extends 6" from each terrain feature that has a friendly **overgrown token**.

Increase this range by 1" for each friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN** unit that is wholly outside friendly territory.

rules.name: Elder Authority
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if there is a friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** on the battlefield.
rules.effect:
You can set up up to 2 additional **Awakened Wyldwoods** on the battlefield (an **Awakened Wyldwood** is a single tree miniature with a crescent- shaped base). The first can be set up anywhere on the battlefield more than 3" from all units, objectives and other terrain features. The second can be set up anywhere on the battlefield wholly outside of enemy territory and more than 3" from all units, objectives and other terrain features.

**Designer’s Note:** *The original* **Awakened Wyldwood** *is set up in Step 1 of the deployment phase using the 'Deploy Faction Terrain’ ability. This ability allows you to set up a second and third such terrain feature and is used in Step 3 of the deployment phase, after armies have been deployed.*

rules.name: Roused to Fury
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of a friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** to be the target.
rules.effect:
Pick 1 of the following units:

• A friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN** unit that is in reserve as a **dormant forest spirit**.
• A friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN MONSTER** that has been destroyed.

Set up the unit you picked, or a replacement unit if you picked a destroyed unit, within 9" of the target, wholly within 6" of that friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** and not in combat. If you set up a replacement unit, allocate 6 damage points to it (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

Then, remove that friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** from the battlefield.

artefacts.name: Rejuvenating Companions
artefacts.effect: **Heal (3)** this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Ancient Might
heroicTraits.effect: This unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it is in combat. If the charge roll is 3 or less when it does so, it does not count as having charged.

lores.name: Lords of the Clan Prayer Lore

spells.name: Song of Persistence
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN MONSTER** that is wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** or that is visible to them and wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the effect of the ‘Battle Damaged’ ability on the target. In addition, if the chanting roll was 6+, the target has **WARD (6+)** until the start of your next turn.

lores.name: Lords of the Clan Spell Lore

spells.name: Call Forth the Forest
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: If there are fewer than 9 friendly **Awakened Wyldwoods** on the battlefield, you can set up an **Awakened Wyldwood** wholly within 24" of the caster, more than 3" from all objectives and more than 1" from all enemy units and other terrain features. If there are 9 friendly **Awakened Wyldwoods** on the battlefield, **Heal (3)** each friendly **Awakened Wyldwood** instead.

manifestationLores.name: Lords of the Clan Manifestation Lore

spells.name: Jade Winds
spells.declare:
Pick a friendly **LORDS OF THE CLAN WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly **MANIFESTATIONS** below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

• **Gladewyrm**
• **Spiteswarm Hive**
• **Vengeful Skullroot**
spells.effect: If you picked a **Gladewyrm** or **Vengeful Skullroot**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you picked a **Spiteswarm Hive**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: Murkvast Menagerie
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Grizzot seemed torn on what to make of Swampboss Skumdrekk. Said that the old Gitsnatcha knew how to treat a hobgrot right – not clipping them round the ear every opportunity he gets, for starters – but that you never got the stink of fraternising with him off of you. I think he meant that both literally and figuratively. Neither statement endeared me to the orruk. Grizzot claimed that Skumdrekk’s odd, going to war more for profit than the sheer joy of it – either looking for monsters to swell his “Murkvast Menagerie” or for sturdy-looking warriors to set them loose on. It’s supposedly seen as a privilege amongst the swamp orruks to join one of these expeditions, with Kruleboyz beast handlers coming from leagues around to fight for a place.

Skumdrekk himself is one of the Grinnin’ Blades, or at least he was before he set up shop for himself. Still, most of his followers are orruks from the Skulbugz who trek all the way from Shyish to join his crew. They bring with them creepy crawlies from their homeland that infest the rest of the menagerie, not that most of the swamp beasts that Skumdrekk has broken into his power care much either way. I’m a hunter myself, but even so, I’ve no desire to meet this Skumdrekk. Not unless I’m the one to put a bolt in his eye and finally end decades’ worth of menace.

When you pick the Kruleboyz faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Murkvast Menagerie Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Kruleboyz faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options as described in Army of Renown: Murkvast Menagerie. All units in your army gain the Murkvast Menagerie keyword.

rules.name: Crawly Swarm
rules.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE** units while they are wholly within 12" of a friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER** that has not charged this turn.

rules.name: After It, Ladz!
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER** unit that was not set up this turn to be the target.
rules.effect: The target can move up to 3". It can move into combat. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.

rules.name: Propa Grisly
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER** unit that has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect:
Roll a number of dice equal to the Health characteristic of that **MURKVAST MENAGERIE MONSTER**. For each 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use any other **RAMPAGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Skinwriggla Larvae
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick an objective within 6" of this unit to be **infested with bugs** for the rest of the battle.
artefacts.effect:
While an enemy unit is contesting an objective that is **infested with bugs**:

• Subtract 3 from that unit’s control score.
• Ignore positive modifiers to that unit’s control score.

heroicTraits.name: Grim Diet
heroicTraits.effect: This unit has **WARD (5+)**.

spells.name: Morkish Mist
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has **WARD (5+)**.

spells.name: Summon Foot of Gork
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Foot of Gork** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **MURKVAST MENAGERIE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Foot of Gork** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. A **Foot of Gork** has 2 parts that must be set up within 9" of each other.

armiesOfRenown.name: Pioneer Outpost
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The meritocratic society of the Kharadron builds up its armies not only during times of war but also to continue the eternal and dangerous hunt for aether‑gold, a legendary substance that glimmers like frost-laden clouds and is lighter than air. These doughty skyfarers are also renowned merchants amongst the rest of mortalkind, for the Kharadron’s never-ending ventures call for the backing of immense wealth.

Due to the twin tenets of mercantile and martial prowess that hold Kharadron society aloft, an individual’s status is measured primarily by skill. Traders amongst the Kharadron who seek glory must be strong enough to weather any storm and intelligent enough to negotiate the best deals. This requires an encyclopaedic grasp of the Kharadron Code, the universal set of rules that governs every aspect of their society. Many Kharadron Captains and Admirals are so cunning that they can negotiate their way into or out of any situation, and an arsenal full of aethermatic weapons to deal with any threats to their profit margins.

When you pick the Kharadron Overlords faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Pioneer Outpost Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Kharadron Overlords faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: Pioneer Outpost. All units in your army gain the Pioneer keyword.

rules.name: Initial Investment
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
rules.effect: Each friendly **AUTO-ENDRIN** can move 2D6" but cannot finish that move in combat.

rules.name: Settling Accounts
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **CODE** abilities this turn and if a friendly **AUTO-ENDRIN** was destroyed this turn by an enemy unit.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, each time a friendly **AUTO-ENDRIN** is removed from the battlefield, before removing it, inflict D3 mortal damage on each enemy unit within 3" of that **AUTO-ENDRIN**.

rules.name: Aggressive Acquisitions
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **CODE** abilities this turn and if there is a friendly **PIONEER** unit in each large quarter of the battlefield. Each of those units must be more than 6" from all other large quarters of the battlefield and not in combat.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, enemy units cannot be set up within your territory or within 9" of an objective that you control.

rules.name: Secure Investments
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **CODE** abilities this turn and if any enemy units that were within 3" of your **Zontari Endrin Dock** this turn were destroyed this turn.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, ignore the Rend characteristic of combat attacks that target friendly non-**INFANTRY PIONEER** units or friendly faction terrain features.

rules.name: Hostile Takeover
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **CODE** abilities this turn and if an enemy **HERO** was destroyed by shooting attacks made by a friendly **PIONEER** unit this turn.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly **PIONEER** units or friendly faction terrain features.

rules.name: Market Dominance
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **CODE** abilities this turn and if you control every objective that is not wholly within enemy territory.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, each time you use your **Zontari Endrin Dock**’s ‘Endrinworks Outpost’ ability, you can set up a replacement **AUTO-ENDRIN** on a manufacturing roll of 3+ instead of 4+.

artefacts.name: Rockbuster Charges
artefacts.declare: Pick a terrain feature that this unit passed across this turn. Each enemy unit within 1" of that terrain feature is a target.
artefacts.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

artefacts.name: Thorgsson's Universal Automaton Actuator
artefacts.effect: Add 6" to the Move characteristic of friendly **AUTO-ENDRINS** while they are wholly within 6" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Copper Fingers
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared the ‘Endrinworks Outpost’ ability for a Zontari Endrin Dock
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit is wholly within 9" of that **Zontari Endrin Dock**, instead of resolving the effect of the ‘Endrinworks Outpost’ ability, set up a replacement **AUTO-ENDRIN** on the battlefield, wholly within 6" of that **Zontari Endrin Dock** and more than 3" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Territorial Trailblazer
heroicTraits.effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.

armiesOfRenown.name: Ruination Brotherhood
armiesOfRenown.lore:
It is said that Iridan was escorted by armed guard to the throne of the God-King for their actions, having contravened laws that even Sigmar had not thought to codify. Yet when questioned, they spoke with such conviction that any thought of punishment was swiftly abandoned. Sigmar saw that Iridan was no kin-slayer but a warrior of rare bravery. He decreed that Iridan could no longer bear the rank of Lord-Celestant but would instead aid Ionus Cryptborn in the creation of the Ruination chambers. It was Iridan who founded the Memorian Order to ensure that Ruination warriors would never lose sight of their heroic past lives. It was Iridan who assumed responsibility for remembering the proud histories of every damaged soul consigned to the Bleak Citadels. Iridan's duty, however, is not merely one of solemn scholarship: when the Ruination chambers march to war, it is with the Witness at their head, riding atop loyal Ariax. They call upon their empathic power and the blessings of Morrda to awaken their companions' memories of past glories, alloying urgency and passion with stormgiven strength.

When you pick the Stormcast Eternals faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Ruination Brotherhood Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Stormcast Eternals faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: Ruination Brotherhood. All units in your army gain the Ruination Brotherhood keyword.

rules.name: Ancient Aura
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army) Any Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **RUINATION CHAMBER** unit.
rules.effect: That unit has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Hallowed Presence
rules.effect: While friendly **WARRIOR CHAMBER** units are wholly within 12" of any friendly **RUINATION CHAMBER** units, those friendly **WARRIOR CHAMBER** units have **WARD (6+)**.

rules.name: Entropic Screech
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **RUINATION CHAMBER MONSTER** that has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability. Then, pick up to 3 enemy units in combat with it to be the targets.
rules.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. The unit using this ability cannot use any more **RAMPAGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Temper the Flaw
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: You must use this ability at the end of each turn. Each friendly non-**HERO RUINATION CHAMBER** unit that used a **FIGHT** ability this turn is a target.
rules.effect:
For each target, pick 1 of the following effects:

• ***Guided:*** If the target is wholly within 12" of any friendly **RUINATION CHAMBER HEROES**, return 1 slain model to it.
• ***Tormented:*** If the target is not wholly within 12" of any friendly **RUINATIONS CHAMBER HEROES**, it becomes tormented until the end of the next turn. While a unit is tormented, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of its melee weapons but it cannot contest objectives or use commands.

artefacts.name: Hallowed Scrolls
artefacts.effect: If this unit is **INFANTRY**, it has **WARD (5+)**. Otherwise, it has **WARD (6+)**.

heroicTraits.name: Corven Lord
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit has the 'Ruination Chamber', ability, it can use that ability once per turn regardless of whether another friendly unit has used it during the same turn.

spells.name: Murderous Flock
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **RUINATION BROTHERHOOD PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit. If the chanting roll was 10+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target unit for each 4+ instead.

spells.name: Raven's Flight
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **RUINATION BROTHERHOOD PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic for the rest of the turn. If the chanting roll was 8+, in addition, for the rest of the turn, the target can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they have used a **RUN** ability in the same turn.

spells.name: Morrda's Embrace
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **RUINATION BROTHERHOOD PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll exceeds the target's Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain. If the chanting roll was 10+, roll 2D6 instead.
