armiesOfRenown.name: Scions of Nulahmia
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The hosts of Nulahmia seek to emulate the majesty of Queen Neferata, both in the macabre glory of their heraldry and the contemptuous ease with which they dispose of their enemies. To these aristocratic vampires, the battlefield represents an opportunity to see their devious schemes come to fruition, as their opponents are overwhelmed by sorcery, misdirection and flocks of ravenous grave-beasts.

When you pick the Soulblight Gravelords faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Scions of Nulahmia Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Soulblight Gravelords faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: Scions of Nulahmia. All units in your army gain the Scions of Nulahmia keyword.

rules.name: The Queen's Prize
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **EXQUISITE PLOT** abilities this turn. Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn, add 5 to the target’s control score.

In addition, at the end of this turn, after determining control of objectives, if the target is contesting an objective that you control and that was controlled by your opponent at the start of this turn, add 5 to the target’s control score for the rest of the battle.

rules.name: Recruitment Drive
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **EXQUISITE PLOT** abilities this turn. Pick a friendly unit to be the **hunter** and an enemy unit with 5 or more models to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to hit rolls for the **hunter**’s combat attacks that target that enemy unit. In addition, if the target is destroyed this turn by the **hunter**, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the **hunter**’s melee weapons for the rest of the battle.

rules.name: Seek Worthy Blood
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **EXQUISITE PLOT** abilities this turn. Pick a friendly unit to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, the target’s weapons have **Anti-HERO (+1 Rend)**. In addition, if the target destroys any enemy **HEROES** this turn, the target’s weapons have **Anti-HERO (+1 Rend)** for the rest of the battle.

rules.name: Thaumic Realignment
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **EXQUISITE PLOT** abilities this turn. Pick a friendly **WIZARD** to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to casting rolls for the target. In addition, at the end of this turn, if the target successfully cast any spells this turn, add 1 to its power level for the rest of the battle.

artefacts.name: Amulet of Leeches
artefacts.effect:
While this unit is within the combat range of a friendly **Dire** **Wolves** or **Fell Bats** unit:

• This unit has **WARD (5+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for this unit, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly **Dire Wolves** or **Fell** **Bats** unit within this unit’s combat range after the damage sequence for this unit has been resolved (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points).

heroicTraits.name: Keeper of the Royal Menagerie
heroicTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **Dire Wolves** or **Fell Bats** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
heroicTraits.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Thrall Drain
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SCIONS OF NULAHMIA WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: D3 models in the target are slain. Then, remove all damage points from the caster.

spells.name: Scarlet Thirst
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SCIONS OF NULAHMIA WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly **SCIONS OF NULAHMIA Vampire** units while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.

spells.name: Invocation of Nulahmia
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SCIONS OF NULAHMIA WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **Dire Wolves** or **Fell Bats** unit wholly within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: You can return 1 slain model to that unit.

unitPool: Scourge of Ghyran Sekhar, Fang of Nulahmia
requiredWarscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Sekhar, Fang of Nulahmia
requiredGeneralWarscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Sekhar, Fang of Nulahmia

warscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Sekhar, Fang of Nulahmia

armiesOfRenown.name: Soulpod Guardians
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The Sylvaneth’s soulpod groves can be found in forests throughout the Mortal Realms. Armies on the march may stumble upon and disturb them, if not attack them for their own ends. Should this happen, the wrath of the grove’s guardians is terrible indeed, for they fight to ensure their people’s very survival.

When you pick the Sylvaneth faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Soulpod Guardians Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Sylvaneth faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed as described in Army of Renown: Soulpod Guardians. All units in your army gain the **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** keyword.

rules.name: The Sacred Groves
rules.declare: You must use this ability.
rules.effect:
Set up 3 **Awakened Wyldwoods** (an Awakened Wyldwood is a single tree miniature with a crescent-shaped base) wholly within friendly territory, more than 1" from all other terrain features and more than 3" from all objectives. The tips of each crescent-shaped base must touch, forming a circle.

Once you have done so, for the rest of the battle, the 3 tree miniatures join to form 1 **Soulpod Grove** terrain feature. The area inside the circle formed by the trees is part of the terrain feature

rules.name: Jade Haven
rules.effect: The Health characteristic of your **Soulpod Grove** is 18. The **creeping overgrowth** extends 12" from your **Soulpod Grove**.

rules.name: Vengeance for the Lost
rules.effect: If your **Soulpod Grove** has been demolished this battle, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** units’ melee weapons.

rules.name: Heart of the Forest
rules.effect: You cannot allocate more than 10 damage points per phase to a friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** unit while it is wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove** (remaining damage points inflicted on it in that phase have no effect).

artefacts.name: Clarionbuds
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
artefacts.declare: If there is an enemy unit wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove**, pick up to 3 friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** units to be the targets.
artefacts.effect: Remove the targets from the battlefield and set them up again wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove** and more than 6" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Devoted Protector
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit is destroyed while it is wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove**, before removing this unit from the battlefield, **Heal (10)** your **Soulpod Grove**.

spells.name: Song of Vengeance
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS** unit that is wholly within 12" of them and not in combat or that is wholly within 12" of your **Soulpod Grove** to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: If the chanting roll was 8+, you can pick another eligible unit to be a second target. The target(s) can move up to 5" and can end that move in combat.

spells.name: Cradling Vines
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick an objective within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 5 to the control scores of friendly units while they are contesting the target objective.

spells.name: Jade Winds
spells.declare:
Pick a friendly **SOULPOD GUARDIANS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly **MANIFESTATIONS** below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

• **Gladewyrm**
• **Spiteswarm Hive**
• **Vengeful Skullroot**
spells.effect: If you picked a **Gladewyrm** or **Vengeful Skullroot**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units. If you picked a **Spiteswarm Hive**, set it up wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: Taar's Grand Forgehost
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The Forge Anathema dominates much of Aqshy’s Adamantine Chain – a monument to cruelty and grandeur, its armies filled with seemingly endless ranks of warriors and vast cohorts of daemon machines powered by all manner of esoteric fuels. Though not the first ziggurat, the Forge Anathema eagerly accepted Hashut’s offerings. Burning with greed, its overlords – led by Urak Taar, most ancient and malign of Daemonsmiths – reap bounties of smouldering realmstone and captured daemon-essences.

When you pick the Helsmiths of Hashut faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Taar’s Grand Forgehost Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules in Army of Renown: Taar's Grand Forgehost instead of the Helsmiths of Hashut faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: Taar's Grand Forgehost. All units in your army gain the GRAND FORGEHOST keyword.

rules.name: Rising Fire
rules.effect:
The following cumulative effects apply to friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST** units in each battle round after the first.

**Battle Round 2:**
***Daemonic Weaponry:*** Those units’ weapons have **Crit (2 Hits)**.

**Battle Round 3:**
***Harnessed Sorcery:*** Add 1 to casting rolls and chanting rolls for those units.

**Battle Round 4:**
***Channelled Power:*** Attacks made by those units score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.

**Battle Round 5:**
***Arcane Dominance:*** Add 1 to the power level of those units if they are a **WIZARD** or **PRIEST**.

rules.name: Masterful Daemonworks
rules.effect: Friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST WAR MACHINES** have **WARD (6+)**.

rules.name: Dread Ranks Unbroken
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO GRAND FORGEHOST INFANTRY** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
rules.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up), wholly within 6" of the battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Talisman of Obsidian
artefacts.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Ruthless Oversser
heroicTraits.effect: Each time a friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.

spells.name: Shackling Curse
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: For the rest of the turn, the target’s attacks cannot score critical hits (treat them as regular hits instead).

spells.name: Reinforce Daemonsteel
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point allocated to each friendly **HELSMITHS OF HASHUT** unit in each phase while they are wholly within 12" of the caster.

spells.name: Grasp of Stone
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn. If the chanting roll was 8+, the target also has **STRIKE-LAST** until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Lava Storm
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GRAND FORGEHOST PRIEST** to chant this prayer. Pick an enemy unit to be the target and roll 6 dice. For each 6, pick an additional enemy unit to be a target. Then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: If the chanting roll was 7+, pick an additional enemy unit to be a target. Inflict D3 mortal damage on each target.

unitPool: Scourge of Ghyran Infernal Cohort with Hashutite Blades

warscrolls: Scourge of Ghyran Infernal Cohort with Hashutite Blades

armiesOfRenown.name: Thanquol's Mutated Menagerie
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Over the years, Thanquol has cultivated many cronies amongst the Clans Moulder - a necessary precaution to ensure there is always someone to recreate Boneripper. Because of his renegade status, these are often Master Moulders who, having fallen foul of their clans, are forced to tie their fortunes to the erratic Grey Seer. Thanquol further cements their loyalty by offering smatterings of crypto- sorcerous knowledge and intriguing specimens acquired during his misadventures. Following the Era of the Beast, Thanquol has charged these minions with creating a truly hideous menagerie of horrors that serve exclusively at his command. He intends to test this stitched-together horde in the spasmodic carnage of the Hour of Ruin before marching them against the Masterburrow itself and using violence to claim his place on the Council.

When you pick the Skaven faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Thanquol's Mutated Menagerie Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Skaven faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options as described in Army of Renown: Thanquol's Mutated Menagerie. All units in your army gain the Mutated Menagerie keyword.

rules.name: Monstrous Entourage
rules.effect:
The **Companion** weapon ability has no effect on **MUTATED MENAGERIE** units. While a friendly **Thanquol** is within the combat range of another friendly Mutated Menagerie unit:

• That **Thanquol** has **WARD (4+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for that **Thanquol**, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly **MUTATED MENAGERIE** unit within its combat range after the damage sequence has been resolved.

rules.name: Rampaging Demise
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER** unit that has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect:
This unit has **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn. However, at the end of the turn, this unit is destroyed. When this unit would be destroyed, before it is removed from play, roll a D3 for each enemy unit within 6" of this unit. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use any other **RAMPAGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Spiteful Swarms
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER** unit that has not used any **RAMPAGE** abilities this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect:
This unit has **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn. However, at the end of the turn, this unit is destroyed. When this unit would be destroyed, before it is removed from play, roll a dice for each enemy unit within 6" of this unit. On a 3+, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of that enemy unit's melee weapons for the rest of the battle.

After this ability has been resolved, this unit cannot use any other **RAMPAGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: More-more Mutation!
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE** unit to be the target. You cannot pick the same unit to be the target of this ability more than once per battle.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the battle:

• Add 2 to the target's Health characteristic.
• Add 2" to the target's Move characteristic.
• Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target's melee weapons.
• The target has **WARD (5+)**.
• At the end of each turn, allocate D3+2 damage points to the target.

artefacts.name: Warpstone Innards
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER** unit wholly within 13" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target's melee weapons for the rest of the battle. However, at the end of each turn, allocate D3 damage points to the target.

heroicTraits.name: Pack Tactics
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
heroicTraits.declare: Pick up to 2 friendly non-**HERO MUTATED MENAGERIE MONSTER** units wholly within 13" of this unit to be the targets.
heroicTraits.effect: The targets can each use the 'All-out Attack' or 'All-out Defence' command this phase even if that command has been used by a friendly unit this phase.

spells.name: Untapped Mutation
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **MUTATED MENAGERIE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick up to 3 visible friendly **MUTATED MENAGERIE** units wholly within 13" of them that are affected by the 'More-more Mutation!' ability to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: For each damage point allocated to the target at the end of this turn by the 'More-more Mutation!' ability, add 1 to the target's control score until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Summon Warp Lightning Vortex
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Warp Lightning Vortex** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **SKAVEN WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up the first part of the **Warp Lightning Vortex** within 18" of the caster and visible to them, then set up the second and third parts exactly 7" from the first part and exactly 7" from each other so that they form a triangle.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Baleful Lords
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The Baleful Lords are a legion of Bloodthirsters, an army entirely composed ofKhorne's murderous greater daemons. Time and again, in the maddening conflicts of the Great Game, they have proved the decisive force that has broken the numberless legions of his brother gods and claimed victory for the Lord of Skulls. When such triumphs are won, a great reward is granted: the chance to take to the Mortal Realms and further the cause of Khorne by annihilating all that stands before them. Truth be told, little can resist such an assemblage of apocalyptic might for long. As the battlefield is darkened by the shadow of bat-like wings, enemies look up to see a nightmare descending. The wise simply flee before they are forced to endure the blood-soaked horror that inevitably follows.

When you pick the Blades of Khorne faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Baleful Lords Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Blades of Khorne faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: The Baleful Lords. All units in your army gain the **BALEFUL LORDS** keyword.

rules.name: Born of Butchery
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE** **BALEFUL LORDS** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the current battle round number plus the number of units (friendly and enemy) that have been destroyed this battle. If the roll contains 8 or more results of 3+, set up a replacement unit identical to the target on the battlefield, wholly within 7" of the battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

rules.name: Bellow of Hatred
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **BALEFUL LORDS** unit that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, enemy units cannot use commands while they are in combat with the target. The target cannot use **RAMPAGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Mage-Eaters
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared a **SPELL** ability.
rules.effect: Make a magic-eater roll of D6. On a 3+, that spell is unbound. If the spell was unbound and the magic-eater roll was 5+, inflict D3 mortal damage on the caster.

rules.name: First In His Sight
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Enemy Turn
rules.effect: **Heal (D3)** each friendly **BALEFUL LORDS HERO** that is in combat.

rules.name: Drawn By Blood
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **BALEFUL LORDS** unit that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect:
That unit can move D6". It can end that move in combat but only with units it was in combat with at the start of the phase.

If that unit destroyed any enemy units this turn, then instead:

That unit can move 2D6". It can end that move in combat with any units that had any damage points allocated to them this turn.

rules.name: The Price of Mercy
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
rules.declare: You must use this ability. Pick each friendly **BALEFUL LORDS** unit that did not charge or use a **FIGHT** ability this turn to be a target.
rules.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

rules.name: Sunder the Sorcerous
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
rules.declare: Pick each enemy **MANIFESTATION** within 3" of a friendly **BALEFUL LORDS** unit to be a target.
rules.effect:
Roll 2D6 for each target. If the roll equals or exceeds the banishment value of the target:
• That target is banished and removed from play.
• Inflict D3 mortal damage on the enemy unit that summoned the target.

artefacts.name: Crown of the Slaughterborn
artefacts.effect: Enemy units within 12" of this unit cannot be healed and cannot have slain models returned to them.

heroicTraits.name: Unrivalled Battlelust
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Combat Phase
heroicTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of friendly **BALEFUL LORDS** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Clattering Procession
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Though ragged in appearance, the Nighthaunt are deadly foes. They are swift as a freezing gale, manifesting from thin air without warning, and their pitted swords and notched axes are sharp with pure spite. The Nighthaunt's most potent weapon, however, is the fear they evoke in the living. Few can resist it, and entire armies visibly baulk when the wailing and moaning of the eternally damned is carried to their ears on the chill wind.

Amongst the most horrifying of the Nighthaunt lords is Reikenor the Grimhailer. A raggedly macabre creature, he rides a winged and incorporeal steed clad in patinated armour and trailing shreds of soul essence. Through the rusting maw of his dread mask, he proclaims the names of his victims in a condemning declaration.

When you pick the Nighthaunt faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Clattering Procession Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Nighthaunt faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: The Clattering Procession. All units in your army gain the CLATTERING PROCESSION keyword.

rules.name: Ethereal
rules.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly **NIGHTHAUNT** units.

rules.name: The Speed of Death
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Your Turn
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit that used a **CHARGE** or **RETREAT** ability this turn, is not in combat and is wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge to use this ability.
rules.effect: Remove that unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 9" of a battlefield edge and more than 3" from all enemy units.

rules.name: Spectral Swiftness
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit that is in combat to use this ability.
rules.effect: That unit can move a distance up to its Move characteristic. It can pass through other models and the combat ranges of enemy units, but it cannot end that move in combat.

rules.name: Pitiless Reapers
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit that passed across any enemy units this phase to use this ability, then pick 1 of those enemy units to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice for each model in the **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit that passed across the target. Add 1 to the roll if any friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION Black Coaches** passed across the target this phase. For each 6+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

artefacts.name: Talisman of the Nadir
artefacts.phaseDetails: Reaction: Opponent declared a SPELL ability
artefacts.effect: If a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit wholly within 12" of this unit was picked to be the target of that spell, this unit can use the 'Unbind' ability as if it had **WIZARD (1).** Add 1 to the unbinding roll for that ability.

heroicTraits.name: Silent Overseer
heroicTraits.declare: Pick up to 3 friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** units wholly within 12" of this unit to be the targets.
heroicTraits.effect: For the rest of the turn, the targets can use **CHARGE** abilities even if they used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn.

spells.name: Spectral Lashes
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit wholly within 12" of them and that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 2" to the target's Move characteristic for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: Fell Riders
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick the caster and up to 1 other visible friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the targets, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: You can re-roll run rolls and charge rolls for the targets for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: Summon Shyish Reaper
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Shyish Reaper** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **CLATTERING PROCESSION WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Shyish Reaper** wholly within 9" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

unitPool: Knight of Shrouds on Ethereal Steed

armiesOfRenown.name: The Croneseer’s Pariahs
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The enigmatic figure known as Krethusa the Croneseer has revived the worship of an ancient goddess, provoking radicalism and dissent among the Khainites. Many outcasts and renegades flock to her side, awed by her gift of foresight and her staunch defence of traditions that Morathi Khaine has long tried to suppress.

When you pick the Daughters of Khaine faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a The Croneseer’s Pariahs Army of Renown. If you do so, use these faction rules instead of the Daughters of Khaine faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: The Croneseer's Pariahs. All units in your army gain the Croneseer’s Pariahs keyword.

rules.name: Plumes of Auspicious Smoke
rules.effect:
Friendly **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit** units are either **empty** or **full**. They start the battle **empty**. While a friendly **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit** unit is **full**:

• That **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit** has **WARD (4+)** against damage points inflicted by shooting attacks.
• Subtract 1 from hit rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS** units while they are wholly within 9" of that **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit**.

rules.name: Skilled Skirmishers
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS CAVALRY** unit that has not charged this turn and is in combat with an enemy unit that charged this turn to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On 3+, the target can immediately use a **RETREAT** ability as if it were your movement phase. In addition, no mortal damage is inflicted on the target by that **RETREAT** ability.

rules.name: Guided by Morai-Heg
rules.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of combat attacks made by friendly non-**HERO INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 9" of a friendly **Krethusa**.

rules.name: The Blood Reveals All
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS HERO** within the combat range of a friendly **empty** **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit**. Then, pick another unit within the combat range of that **HERO** to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. Allocate a number of damage points to the target equal to the roll (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, that **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit** becomes **full**.

rules.name: Laden with Prophecy
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **empty Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit**.
rules.effect: If any enemy models were slain this turn by that **Slaughter Queen on Cauldron of Blood** or **Hag Queen on Cauldron of Blood unit'**s combat attacks, it becomes **full**.

artefacts.name: Blade of Prophetic Doom
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, End of Any Turn
artefacts.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 2+:

• If the target is not damaged, inflict 1 mortal damage on it.
• If the target is damaged, inflict an amount of mortal damage on it equal to the roll.

heroicTraits.name: Proselyte of Morai-Heg
heroicTraits.effect: Enemy units cannot use commands while they are in combat with this unit.

spells.name: Augury of Battle
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS** unit wholly within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has **WARD (5+)**. If the chanting roll was 10+, you can pick up to 2 friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS** units wholly within 18" of the caster instead of 1.

spells.name: Auspicious Strike
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the unmodified hit roll for an attack made against the target is 1, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved. If the chanting roll was 10+, inflict 1 mortal damage for each unmodified hit roll of 1-2 instead.

spells.name: Wings of the Crone Goddess
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **CRONESEER’S PARIAHS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:

• The target has **FLY**.
• Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic. If the chanting roll was 8+, add 6" to the target’s Move characteristic instead.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Equinox Feast
armiesOfRenown.lore:
High Falconer Felgryn is a creature of divided reputation. To the serfs, he is something of a folk hero: a cheerful rogue who protects the wilds of their kingdoms with his loyal menagerie. To many abhorrant nobles, he is a gluttonous menace, given to ransacking their pantries and falling into gory indulgences that even his hosts find off-putting. Both viewpoints have merit, for Felgryn is a cunning and savage beast – and he revels in this fact.

When you pick the Flesh-eater Courts faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the Equinox Feast Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Flesh-eater Courts faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box opposite. All units in your army gain the Equinox Feast keyword.

rules.name: The Equinox Parade
rules.effect:
In the first battle round:

•  Add 1 to run rolls for friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** units for each other friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** unit that has used a **RUN** ability this phase.

•  Add D6" to the distance friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** units can move when they use a **RETREAT** ability.

rules.name: A Display of Falconry
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Charge Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability in the second battle round. Pick each enemy unit that used a **CHARGE** ability this phase to be the targets.
rules.effect: Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

rules.name: The Ritual Dance
rules.effect: In the third battle round, while a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** unit is in combat with an enemy unit that contains any champions, musicians or standard bearers, it can move 6" instead of 3" when it makes a pile-in move.

rules.name: Eat Your Fill!
rules.effect:
In the fourth battle round, each time a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** unit uses a **FIGHT** ability, after that ability has been resolved:

• If that unit is damaged, **Heal (D3)** that unit.
•  If that unit is not damaged, return up to 3 slain models to it.

rules.name: Make Merry 'Til the Morn
rules.effect: In the fifth battle round, friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** units have **WARD (4+)** while they are within 3" of 2 or more other visible friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** units.

artefacts.name: Broken Sceptre of the Solstice
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
artefacts.declare: Pick a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** unit that has been destroyed to be the target. This unit can use this ability if it has been destroyed, but if it does, this unit must be the target.
artefacts.effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 6" of a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST** unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

heroicTraits.name: Lord of Revelries
heroicTraits.effect: Ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to this unit in each phase.

spells.name: A Midsummer Mania
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly unit wholly within 12" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this prayer this turn to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Return D3 slain models to the target unit. If the chanting roll was 8+, return D3+3 slain models to the target unit instead.

spells.name: Solarite Flares
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a point on the battlefield that is visible to them, then pick each unit (friendly and enemy) within 3" of that point to be the targets. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Roll a dice for each target. On a 3+, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Summon Chalice of Ushoran
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Chalice of Ushoran** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **EQUINOX FEAST WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Chalice of Ushoran** wholly within 12" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Eternal Nightmare
armiesOfRenown.lore:
God of Death and ruler of Shyish, Nagash is one of the greatest sorcerers in existence. None can match his mastery of necromancy, and it was he who pioneered this fell art aeons ago in a land lost to history. He is known as the Undying King, for he is eternal. Despite the many attempts of his enemies to vanquish him, Nagash has always endured, returning from apparent destruction time and again to exact his vengeance. A figure of pure evil, his ego and vainglory are without equal. Few can withstand his baleful gaze and live, for within it is the very essence of unmaking.

When you pick the Nighthaunt faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a The Eternal Nightmare Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Nighthaunt faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: The Eternal Nightmare. All units in your army gain the ETERNAL NIGHTMARE keyword.

rules.name: Ethereal
rules.effect: Ignore negative modifiers to save rolls for friendly **NIGHTHAUNT** units, excluding **Nagash.**

rules.name: The Ritual Begins
rules.declare: You must use this ability to set up the friendly **Nagash.** Pick a friendly **Nexus of Grief** wholly within friendly territory to be the **ritual site.**
rules.effect: Set up the friendly **Nagash** within 1" of the **ritual site** and wholly within friendly territory. After you have done so, he has been **deployed.** That **Nexus of Grief** is the **ritual site** for the rest of the battle.

rules.name: Gather Power
rules.effect:
The following effects apply to the friendly **Nagash** during the first and second battle rounds, as shown:

**Battle Round 1:**

• His Move characteristic is'-' and he cannot make pile-in moves.
• He has **WARD (3+).**
• He has a Control characteristic of 1.
• **Alakanash** and **Zefet-nebtar** each have an Attacks characteristic of 2 instead of 4.

**Battle Round 2:**

• His Move characteristic is 6".
• He cannot end a move more than 6" from the **ritual site.**
• He has **WARD (4+).**
• He has a Control characteristic of 5.
• **Alakanash** and **Zefet-nebtar** each have an Attacks characteristic of 2 instead of 4.

rules.name: Unholy Vessel
rules.effect: The **ritual site** has **WARD (4+)** and cannot use the 'Hungry Crypts' ability.

artefacts.name: The Seal of Nagash
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
artefacts.effect: Allocate 3 damage points to this unit (ward rolls cannot be made for those damage points). Then, **Heal (3)** the friendly **Nagash.**

heroicTraits.name: Damned Vessel
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a SPELL ability for a friendly Nagash within 18" of this unit
heroicTraits.effect: Measure the range and visibility of that **SPELL** ability from this unit instead of that **Nagash.**

spells.name: Divine Terror
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Subtract 3 from the target's control score for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: The Will of Nagash
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **ETERNAL NIGHTMARE INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, if the unmodified hit roll or unmodified wound roll for an attack that targets the target unit is 1-3, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

spells.name: Summon Mortalis Terminexus
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Mortalis Terminexus** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Mortalis Terminexus** wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.

spells.name: Summon Shyish Reaper
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Shyish Reaper** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Shyish Reaper** wholly within 9" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Vault of Souls
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Vault of Souls** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **ETERNAL NIGHTMARE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Vault of Souls** wholly within 18" of the caster and visible to them.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Evergreen Hunt
armiesOfRenown.lore:
When flowers bloom in frost and cries fill the forest, shutter your windows and nail up your doors. For the summon of Kurnoth’s First Thorn is irresistible, and it beckons mortals forth to the hunt eternal. The Evergreen Hunt is sworn to slaughter any and all that would endanger their beloved Realm of Life. They are led by Belthanos, said to be a messenger of the Hunter-God Kurnoth himself.

When you pick the Sylvaneth faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a The Evergreen Hunt Army of Renown. If you do so, use these faction rules instead of the Sylvaneth faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options, as described in Army of Renown: The Evergreen Hunt. All units in your army gain the Evergreen Hunt keyword.

rules.name: Nature Aetheric
rules.declare: Pick a terrain feature that is within friendly territory to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the battle, friendly units are wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** while they are wholly within 6" of the target.

rules.name: Opening Horn Blast
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
rules.declare: You must use this ability at the start of the battle round.
rules.effect:
Your chords are reset to 0. Then, you gain 1 **chord**:

• If a friendly **Belthanos** is on the battlefield.
• For each friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** unit that is wholly within the same large quarter of the battlefield as the quarry.
• For each quarry destroyed so far during the battle.

rules.name: Song of the Hunt
rules.effect:
The following cumulative effects apply to friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** units depending on the number of **chords** you have:

**1 chord – *Simple***: Add 1 to run rolls and charge rolls for friendly units wholly within the same quarter of the battlefield as the quarry.

**2 chords – *Tuneful***: Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for friendly units’ combat attacks that target an enemy unit wholly within the same quarter of the battlefield as the quarry.

**3-5 chords – *Melodic***: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons used by friendly units while they are in combat with the quarry.

**6+ chords – *Mellifluous***: While a friendly unit is in combat with the quarry, the quarry has **STRIKE-LAST**.

rules.name: Rhythm of the Chase
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
rules.declare: If there is no **quarry** on the battlefield, pick an enemy unit on the battlefield to be the target.
rules.effect: The target is the **quarry** for the rest of the battle.

rules.name: Questing Tendrils
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Start of Any Turn
rules.declare: Pick the terrain feature that is closest to the **quarry** to be the target.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, friendly units are wholly within the **creeping overgrowth** while they are wholly within 6" of the target.

rules.name: A Prize Quarry is Sighted
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit within 9" of a friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** unit to be the target.
rules.effect: The target becomes the **quarry** for the rest of the battle. If there was already a **quarry** on the battlefield when you declared this ability, that unit is no longer the **quarry**.

rules.name: Merciful Strike
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT MONSTER** that has not used a **RAMPAGE** ability this turn to use this ability, then pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice and add the number of damage points the target has. If the result exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain.

rules.name: Abundant Growth
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick each friendly **EVERGREEN HUNT** unit that is wholly within 3" of a terrain feature to be the targets.
rules.effect: **Heal (1)** each target.

artefacts.name: Heartwood Hunting Horn
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Hero Phase
artefacts.effect: You gain 1 **chord**.

heroicTraits.name: Sapwood Leader
heroicTraits.effect: If you pick this unit to be a target of the 'Abundant Growth’ ability, **Heal (3)** this unit instead of **Heal (1)**.

armiesOfRenown.name: The First Phalanx of Ionrach
armiesOfRenown.lore:
The Ionrach see themselves as the epitome of what it means to be Idoneth. They retain the noble demeanour of the lost Cythai, befitting their self-proclaimed status as the right and true inheritors of that glorious legacy. Warriors of other enclaves are often angered by this arrogance, yet even the wilful renegades of Dhom-hain would not decry the Ionrach’s many achievements. They are supreme pioneers with an innate sense of their own destiny, and their colonies are wider spread and more prosperous than any of their fellow enclaves.

The ultimate wish of every Ionrach is to see the Idoneth’s fractious undersea empire truly united behind the vision of High King Volturnos – the sole remaining Cythai who has chosen them to be the future of the Deepkin race.

When you pick the Idoneth Deepkin faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the First Phalanx of Ionrach Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Idoneth Deepkin faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options as described in Army of Renown: The First Phalanx of Ionrach. All units in your army gain the First Phalanx keyword.

rules.name: The Last Living Cythai
rules.effect: The friendly **Volturnos** has **STRIKE-FIRST**.

rules.name: Teachings of the Asydrazor
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.effect: You gain D3 **asydrazor points**.

rules.name: The Shield of Ulchiss
rules.declare: You must spend 1 **asydrazor point** each time a friendly **FIRST PHALANX** unit uses this ability. Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn:

•  That unit can use a **RETREAT** ability and still use **SHOOT** and/or **CHARGE** abilities later in the turn.
•  No mortal damage is inflicted on that unit by **RETREAT** abilities.

rules.name: The Spear of Asphoren
rules.declare: You must spend 1 **asydrazor point** each time a friendly **FIRST PHALANX** unit uses this ability. Pick a friendly unit that is not in combat to use this ability.
rules.effect: Add 1 to charge rolls for that unit for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: The Sword of Gwynnar
rules.declare: You must spend 1 **asydrazor point** each time a friendly **FIRST PHALANX** unit uses this ability. Pick a friendly unit in combat to use this ability.
rules.effect: That unit has **STRIKE‑FIRST** for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Crest of the Ionrach
artefacts.effect: This unit has **WARD (6+)**.

heroicTraits.name: Prodigy of the Asydrzor
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Reaction: You declared an **ASYDRAZOR** ability for a friendly FIRST PHALANX unit wholly within 12" of this unit
heroicTraits.effect: No **asydrazor points** are spent to use that ability.

other.name: Voidchill Darkness
other.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit if this unit charged this turn.

other.name: Deep Connection
other.effect: Ignore the effect of the **Companion** weapon ability on this unit’s weapons.

other.name: Swift-Finned Skirmisher
other.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared the ‘Redeploy’ command for this unit
other.effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that this unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Gardeners of Nurgle
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Hailed as the Grand Cultivator, Horticulous Slimux is responsible for maintaining the foetid majesty of the Garden of Nurgle and for spreading its fecundity across the Mortal Realms. This is no mean feat, for it is an expansive domain and ever in need of his meticulous attention. Whether tilling fields of withered corpse-flesh or pruning the orchards of rotwood trees to encourage fresh growth, he leaves no patch of the Garden untended.

When you pick the Maggotkin of Nurgle faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the Gardeners of Nurgle Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Maggotkin of Nurgle faction rules.Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: The Gardeners of Nurgle.  All units in your army gain the **GARDENERS OF NURGLE** keyword.

rules.name: The Garden Grows
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.effect: Set up a **Feculent Gnarlmaw** on the battlefield more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.

rules.name: Transplanting
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **Feculent Gnarlmaw** to be the target.
rules.effect: Remove the target from the battlefield and set it up again within 3" of a friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE HERO** and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.

rules.name: The Head Gardener
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.effect: The friendly **Horticulous Slimux** can use his ‘Cultivating the Garden of Nurgle’ ability this phase even if there are 1 or more friendly **Feculent Gnarlmaws** on the battlefield.

rules.name: Putrescent Sap
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick each enemy unit within 3" of any friendly **Feculent** **Gnarlmaws** to be the targets.
rules.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

rules.name: Foul Fauna
rules.effect: Add 2" to the Move characteristic of friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE** **Beasts of Nurgle** and **Plague Drones** units while they are wholly within 6" of any friendly **Feculent** **Gnarlmaws**.

rules.name: Sickly Sores
rules.effect: While a friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE INFANTRY** unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly **Feculent Gnarlmaw**, ignore the first damage point that would be allocated to it in each phase.

artefacts.name: Stinking Sporeseed
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Movement Phase
artefacts.effect: Set up a **Feculent Gnarlmaw** within 3" of this unit and more than 3" from all enemy units, objectives and other terrain features.

heroicTraits.name: Foetid Orchardist
heroicTraits.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for this unit’s combat attacks while it is wholly within 7" of any friendly **Feculent Gnarlmaws**.

lores.name: The Gardeners of Nurgle Spell Lore

spells.name: Scumfall
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE** units that are wholly within 12" of a friendly **Feculent Gnarlmaw** are not visible to units more than 9" away.

spells.name: Munificent Blights
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to the amount of mortal damage inflicted on the target by the ‘Putrescent Sap’ ability.

spells.name: Canopy of Virulence
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **GARDENERS OF NURGLE** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, while the target is wholly within 12" of any friendly **Feculent Gnarlmaws**, ward rolls cannot be made for enemy units in combat with the target.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Great-Grand Gnawhorde
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Reports circulated of blood-smeared ratmen so ravenous they took bites out of one another on the march. Pale armour splattered with gore, their Clawlords wore muzzled helms to mark control over their hunger.Only the Grey Seers, speakers of Vizzik's will, seemed unaffected, though even they twitched at the ever- present droning of bells that accompanied their advance.

Consecrated with Vizzik's infernal blood, these Warpshatter Bells stoked the black hunger to an inferno, sparing only his chosen. One had been narrowly destroyed by Sigmar's storm-things on the isle of Hel's Claw, but so long as thirteen 'blessed' bell towers screamed a wicked toll, the famine-frenzy would seize more clans. There could be no more of these structures, no less - much to the irritation of Skaven who craved status through raising their own ramshackle equivalent.

Leading this Great-grand Gnawhorde, as he dubbed his holy army, Vizzik first purged his domain of both outsiders and recusant ratmen. Amidst an unholy cacophony, he conspired to strike the Adamantine Chain, where his foes had established defensive cordons. If the mountains could be breached by his frenzied swarms, the Parch's innards would be laid bare...

When you pick the Skaven faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a Great-grand Gnawhorde Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Skaven faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options as described in Army of Renown: The Great-Grand Gnawhorde. All units in your army gain the Gnawhorde keyword.

rules.name: Disciples of Vizzik
rules.effect:
While a friendly **Vizzik Skour** is within the combat range of another friendly **GNAWHORDE** Unit:

• That **Vizzik Skour** has **WARD (4+)**.
• Each time you make a successful ward roll for that **Vizzik** **Skour**, allocate 1 damage point to a friendly **GNAWHORDE** Unit within its combat range after the damage sequence has been resolved.

rules.name: Frenzied Momentum
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **WARPSHATTER THROES** abilities this turn. Pick up to 3 friendly **GNAWHORDE** units to be the targets.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn:

• Add 2 to run rolls and charge rolls for the targets.
• Subtract 1 from the targets' control scores.

rules.name: Reckless Abandon
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **WARPSHATTER THROES** abilities this turn. Pick up to 3 friendly **GNAWHORDE** units to be the targets.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn:

• Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the targets' melee weapons.
• Add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks that target those friendly units.

rules.name: Unstoppable Warp-volley
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Shooting Phase
rules.declare: You can only use this ability if you have not used any **WARPSHATTER THROES** abilities this turn. Pick up to 3 friendly **GNAWHORDE** units to be the targets.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the turn:

• Add 3" to the Range characteristic of the targets' ranged weapons.
• The targets cannot use commands.

artefacts.name: Icon of Great-total Supremacy
artefacts.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
artefacts.effect: You can return up to D3 slain models to each friendly **GNAWHORDE INFANTRY** unit with a Health characteristic of up to 3.

heroicTraits.name: Harbinger of the Great Ascendancy
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Start of Any Turn
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit is not in combat, you can use 2 different **WARPSHATTER THROES** abilities this turn instead of 1.

spells.name: Deafening Frenzy
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GNAWHORDE WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **GNAWHORDE INFANTRY** unit wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6. The casting roll for this spell cannot be modified.
spells.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:

• The target has **STRIKE-FIRST**.
• The target cannot use commands.

spells.name: Reverberating Ritual
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **GNAWHORDE PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible friendly **GNAWHORDE INFANTRY** unit wholly within 13" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target can move an extra 3" when it makes a pile-in move. In addition, if the chanting roll was 8+, add 1 to the target's control score until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Summon Vermintide
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Vermintide** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **SKAVEN WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Vermintide** wholly within 13" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Iron March
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Cannons roar and the gun-studded walking castles known as Cogforts lumber forwards, their every step an earthquake and their every barrage gouging gaping holes in the enemy line. Once, these engines of war were used to anchor the ever-expanding borders of Sigmar’s empire. Now First Marshal Tahlia Vedra has ordered them forward en masse, risking her most precious assets to blunt the enemy’s surge and throw them back. Such bold actions might be humanity’s only chance to snatch triumph from the precipice of catastrophe.

When you pick the Cities of Sigmar faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the Iron March Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Cities of Sigmar faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed as described in Army of Renown: The Iron March. All units in your army gain the **IRON MARCH** keyword.

rules.name: Form Up, Iron March!
rules.declare:
Pick a friendly **IRON MARCH** unit to use this ability, then pick either 1 or 2 other visible friendly **IRON MARCH** units wholly within 12" of it to be the targets.

The unit using this ability and the targets:

• cannot be **under orders**.
• must each be a different unit type.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the battle round, the unit using this ability and the targets are **under orders**.

**Designer’s Note:** *‘Unit type’ refers to the name of the warscroll (Core Rules, 4.0), e.g. ‘Cannonade Cogfort’ or ‘Mallus Forgepriest’.*

other.name: Engineer Kirsta Loudren
other.effect: If this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice for each visible unit (friendly and enemy) within its combat range. On a 3+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that unit equal to the roll.

other.name: Engineer Gurrn Ashbrow
other.effect: Each time this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.

other.name: Broadmoore and Louse
other.effect: Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit’s **Crew’s Leadshotters**. In addition, if this unit is destroyed, before removing it from play, roll a dice. On a 3+, you can set up a **Freeguild Marshal and Relic Envoy** wholly within 6" of this unit and not in combat. That unit has the **IRON MARCH** keyword.

other.name: Master Sapper Gravelock Fiske
other.effect: This unit’s ranged weapons have **Anti‑FACTION TERRAIN (+1 Rend)** and **Anti-WAR MACHINE (+1 Rend)**.

other.name: Castellan-Captain Vyan Philsin
other.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **IRON MARCH INFANTRY** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit and **under orders**.

other.name: Commodore De Graçon
other.effect: This unit and up to 1 other friendly **IRON MARCH WAR MACHINE** within this unit’s combat range can use the ‘Normal Move’ ability as if it were your movement phase.

other.name: Castellan-Captain Regan Vandercloud
other.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick a visible enemy unit within 1" of it to be the target.
other.effect:
Roll a D3. On a 2+:
• Inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.
• The target has a maximum control score of 1 for the rest of the turn.

spells.name: The Chant of Iron
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **IRON MARCH PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick either a visible enemy unit within 18" of them or a visible friendly **IRON MARCH** unit that is wholly within 12" of them and that has not been picked to be the target of this ability this turn to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect:
If you picked an enemy unit:

• If the chanting roll was 8+, you can pick another eligible enemy unit to be a second target.
•Subtract 2" from each target’s Move characteristic until the start of your next turn.

If you picked a friendly unit, **Heal (D3)** the target and the chanter. If the chanting roll was 8+, **Heal (D3)** each visible friendly **IRON MARCH** unit that is wholly 12" of the chanter and that has not been healed by this ability this turn instead.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Knights of New Summercourt
armiesOfRenown.lore:
Though cannibal courts infest many forlorn regions, and Shyish most of all, it is not in that morbid realm that their liege resides. Lord Ushoran has instead made his lair in Ghyran, where life ever blooms. His fortress of New Summercourt dominates the mountains of the Neck, its shadow falling over the plains of Verdia.

Though cannibal courts infest many forlorn regions, and Shyish most of all, it is not in that morbid realm that their liege resides. Lord Ushoran has instead made his lair in Ghyran, where life ever blooms. His fortress of New Summercourt dominates the mountains of the Neck, its shadow falling over the plains of Verdia.

rules.name: The Summerking's Colours
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT** unit that contains any standard bearers to be the target.
rules.effect:
For the rest of the battle:

•  While the target unit contains any standard bearers, add 10 to the control scores of friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT** units while they are wholly within 24" of the target.
•  Once all of the standard bearers in the target unit have been slain, subtract 5 from the control scores of friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT** units.

rules.name: In Their Sire's Shadow
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Any Charge Phase
rules.declare: If the friendly **Ushoran** is not in combat and has not used any **RUN** or **RETREAT** abilities this turn, pick him to use this ability. Then, pick up to 2 friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT KNIGHTS** units within his combat range that are not in combat and have not used a **RUN** or **RETREAT** ability this turn to be his **royal retinue**. Then, make a charge roll of 2D6.
rules.effect: The friendly **Ushoran** can move a distance up to the value of the charge roll. He can move through the combat ranges of enemy units and must end that move within ½" of a visible enemy unit. If he does so, he has charged. If he charged, then after this ability has been resolved, each unit in his **royal retinue** can immediately use the ‘Charge’ ability even if it is not your charge phase and you can use the charge roll from this ability instead of making a charge roll when it does so, but it must end the charge move within 3" of the friendly **Ushoran**.

rules.name: A Duel, Good Sir!
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: You must use this ability if the friendly **Ushoran** is in combat with the enemy general. Pick the enemy general to be the target.
rules.effect:
Your opponent must decide whether the target will accept or refuse Ushoran’s challenge.

***Accept***: For the rest of the turn, when the friendly **Ushoran** and the target are picked to use a **FIGHT** ability, all of their attacks must target each other.

***Refuse***: The target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: The Knight's Vow
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick each friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT** unit that did not charge this turn to be the targets.
rules.effect: Start rolling dice, one at a time and one for each target, and stop when you roll a 6. The target you rolled a 6 for can use 2 **FIGHT** abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn. If you rolled for each target and did not roll a 6, this ability has no effect.

rules.name: Nightmarish Charge
rules.effect: Subtract 1 from hit rolls for combat attacks that target friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT** units that charged in the same turn.

rules.name: Red Errantry Hosts
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **KNIGHTS** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
rules.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within friendly territory, wholly within 6" of a battlefield edge and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Feted Coronet
artefacts.effect: This unit has **WARD (4+)** until a friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT** unit is destroyed.

heroicTraits.name: Tip of the King's Lance
heroicTraits.effect: If this unit charged this turn, it can move 2D6". It can pass through models in enemy units, but it must end that move in combat.

lores.name: The Knights of New Summercourt Spell Lore

spells.name: Miasma of Madness
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, for each unmodified hit roll of 1 for a combat attack made by the target, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

spells.name: Deranged Transformation
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT INFANTRY** or **CAVALRY** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:
• Add 2" to the target’s Move characteristic.
• Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s combat attacks.

lores.name: The Knights of New Summercourt Prayer Lore

spells.name: Excommunication!
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT PRIEST** to chant this prayer, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the target, then make a chanting roll of D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore positive modifiers to save rolls for the target. In addition, if the chanting roll was 10+, ward rolls cannot be made for the target until the start of your next turn.

manifestationLores.name: The Knights of New Summercourt Manifestation Lore

spells.name: Summon Corpsemare Stampede
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Corpsemare Stampede** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **NEW SUMMERCOURT WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Corpsemare Stampede** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Lance of Ossia
armiesOfRenown.lore: When you pick the Ossiarch Bonereapers faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the Lance of Ossia Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Ossiarch Bonereapers faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: The Lance of Ossia. All units in your army gain the **LANCE OF OSSIA** keyword.

rules.name: Praetorian Elite
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
rules.declare: You must use this ability if there are any friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA HEROES** on the battlefield. Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA HERO** to be the target.
rules.effect: You gain a number of **relentless discipline** points equal to the number shown after the target's **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** keyword. At the end of the battle round, any unspent **relentless discipline** points are lost.

rules.name: Kavalos Lance
rules.effect: When a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit uses the 'Power Through' command, the target does not have to have a lower Health characteristic than that friendly unit.

rules.name: Vengeful Outriders
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target
rules.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Add 2" to the target's Move characteristic for the rest of the phase.

rules.name: Silent Menace
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.
rules.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. The target cannot use the 'Redeploy' command for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Fury of Zandtos
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that charged this turn and that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target.
rules.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. The target's melee weapons, including **Companion** weapons, have **Crit (2 Hits)** for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Blood-smeared Hooves
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that charged this turn and has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target.
rules.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target's weapons, including **Companion** weapons, for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Helm of Tyranny
artefacts.effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Prevailing Tactician
heroicTraits.effect: If a friendly **Arch-Kavalos Zandtos** is not wholly within 12" of this unit, you gain 2 **relentless discipline** points.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Magnate's Crew
armiesOfRenown.lore:
When his profits are threatened and his people need a saviour, Brokk Grungsson takes the field, his iconic ‘zhaktopper’ helm glinting in Hysh’s light and a bellowed oath upon his lips. The Lord-Magnate of Barak-Nar is famed for having held that title for a record period of time, and it was earned through blood, sweat and cold-hearted business acumen.

Though they were not the first sky-port to ascend into Chamon’s skies, Barak-Nar was the first to truly embrace the way of life that would later become Kharadron culture. It was their magnates who spearheaded the use of aether-gold as fuel, allowing their new customs to exist in perpetuity.

When you pick the Kharadron Overlords faction for your army, you can choose for it to be a The Magnate’s Crew Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Kharadron Overlords faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options as described in Army of Renown: The Magnate's Crew. All units in your army gain the Magnate’s Crew keyword.

rules.name: Loyalty to the Magnate
rules.effect: While a friendly **Brokk Grungsson** is wholly within the combat range of another friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY** unit, both those units have **WARD (5+)**.

rules.name: Pay Your Debts
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit on the battlefield or in reserve to be **indebted**.
rules.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW** units that target the **indebted** unit.

rules.name: Bold Moves
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick any number of friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY** units that are in combat to be the targets. Make an **emergency launch roll** of 3D6 for each target.
rules.effect:
Each target can move a distance up to the value of its **emergency launch roll**. It **can** move through the combat ranges of any enemy units but **cannot** end that move in combat with an enemy unit that it was not in combat with at the start of the phase.

The target(s) cannot use **CHARGE** abilities for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Cutting-Edge Endrinpacks
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Movement Phase
rules.declare: Pick up to 2 friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY** units that are wholly within 9" of a friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW SKYVESSEL** to be the targets.
rules.effect: For the rest of the turn, each target can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RUN** ability in the same turn.

rules.name: Invictunite-lined Hull
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle (Army), Enemy Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW SKYVESSEL** to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a D3. For the rest of the turn, subtract **X** from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target that **SKYVESSEL**, where **X** is equal to the roll.

rules.name: Constant Barrage
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit that had any damage points allocated to it this phase by a friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW** unit’s attacks to be the target.
rules.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target ends a move within 10" of any friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW** units, roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll.

artefacts.name: Aerodynamism
artefacts.effect: If this unit moved this turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for attacks that target this unit for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Guns For All Occasions
artefacts.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target.

heroicTraits.name: Master of Discipline
heroicTraits.effect: Each time a friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW INFANTRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Redeploy’ command, you can re-roll the dice.

heroicTraits.name: Flanking Fire
heroicTraits.effect: Add 1 to hit rolls for shooting attacks made by friendly **MAGNATE’S CREW SKYVESSELS** that target an enemy unit in combat with this unit.

armiesOfRenown.name: The Null Myriad
armiesOfRenown.lore: When you pick the Ossiarch Bonereapers faction for your army, you can choose for it to be the Null Myriad Army of Renown. If you do so, use the faction rules on these pages instead of the Ossiarch Bonereapers faction rules. Every unit in your army must be drawn from the units listed in the roster options box as described in Army of Renown: The Null Myriad. All units in your army gain the **NULL MYRIAD** keyword.

rules.name: Arcane Immunity
rules.effect: Friendly **NULL MYRIAD** units have **WARD (4+)** against damage points inflicted by **SPELL** abilities, **PRAYER** abilities and abilities used by **MANIFESTATIONS.**

rules.name: First of the Mortarchs
rules.effect:
Each time you make a casting roll for a friendly **Arkhan the Black,** if all the following are true, that spell cannot be unbound:

• The unmodified casting roll contains 2 or more results of the same value.
• The casting roll equals or exceeds the spell's casting value.
• The spell is not miscast.

rules.name: Supernatural Absorption
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick an enemy **MANIFESTATION** within a friendly **NULL MYRIAD** unit's combat range to be the target.
rules.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+:

• The target is banished and removed from play.
• If that friendly unit is damaged, **Heal (X)** that friendly unit, where **X** is the target's Health characteristic.
• If that friendly unit is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to **X,** where **X** is the target's Health characteristic.

artefacts.name: Gothizzar Cartouche
artefacts.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **NULL MYRIAD** units that target that unit for the rest of the turn.

heroicTraits.name: Aura of Enervation
heroicTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly **NULL MYRIAD** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

spells.name: Reinforce Construct
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **NULL MYRIAD WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **NULL MYRIAD** unit wholly within 12" of the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: The target has **WARD (5+)** until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Unearthly Aura
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **NULL MYRIAD WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **NULL MYRIAD** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 1 to wound rolls for the target's combat attacks until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Summon Horror of the Necropolis
spells.declare:
Pick a friendly **NULL MYRIAD WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick 1 of the friendly **MANIFESTATIONS** below that is not on the battlefield, then make a casting roll of 2D6.

• **Soulstealer Carrion**
• **Bone-tithe Shrieker**
• **Nightmare Predator**
spells.effect: Set up the **MANIFESTATION** you picked wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.
